name: Help Wanted
about: Request assistance on a specific task or area
title: "[Help Wanted]: "
labels: ["help wanted", "good first issue"]
assignees: []
---

## Task Description
A clear and concise description of the task or area where help is needed.

## Expected Outcome
What is the desired result or contribution?

## Skills Required
List any specific skills or knowledge areas that would be beneficial for this task.

## Mentorship/Guidance
Will mentorship or guidance be provided? If so, how?

## Additional Context
Add any other context or resources that might be helpful for contributors.
